query: найди самый дешевый MacBook Air M2 в Украине (site: olx.ua)
method: Multi-query union sweep of OLX search (6 query variants x 2 pages, price-asc, 253 unique ads merged by listing ID), then page-by-page code verification of every sub-25k candidate (status, price, description, seller account age) + human-grade judgment by the orchestrating model. v1 used a single query and MISSED cheaper valid items — OLX full-text matching is phrase-adjacency-sensitive ('Air 2022 M2' does not match 'air m2'). Single-query sweeps are NOT exhaustive; the owner's challenge (ID10o7Mh) exposed this.

best_pick.title: Apple Macbook Air 13 M2 8/256
best_pick.condition: used, 'ideal state', charger included, no box
best_pick.seller: private (Михаил), account since 2014-05, Kyiv, OLX delivery offered
best_pick.why: Cheapest currently active working M2 with a clean, plain description, no lock/damage/scam markers, 12-year-old account, OLX delivery (buyer protection).

risky_cheaper.note: 8/256 Starlight, claims clean iCloud and 94% battery. Risk markers: 'Найдешевша ціна в Україні!!!' hype, nonexistent 'Air M2 14' size in title (keyword stuffing). ~20% below the credible cluster. A human would inspect in person before paying; cannot be confirmed online.

runners_up.note: owner-sold, 2 years use, clean iCloud, no MDM, account since 2018
reseller macon.sale, 'satisfactory' (worn) condition, video review available
363 cycles / 90% battery, no MDM, account since 2012
OWNER'S FIND that triggered gold v2. Reseller iMax (since 2021, Zaporizhzhia), 87% battery, neverlock, OLX delivery. Fully credible.
v1 best pick. Private, full factory kit, hand-to-hand Kyiv only.

cheaper_but_disqualified.reason: actually MacBook Air M1; 'm2 m3' keyword bait
admits 'полоса на екрані' (visible band on display) while claiming 'ідеальний стан, жодних дефектів' — contradictory description, damaged display; 16/256 at half market price reflects the defect
URL slug says macbook-air-m2 but the LIVE ad sells a Dyson Airstrait hair straightener — listing repurposed by seller. Only page-content vs claim comparison catches this.
MacBook Air M1, 'm2 m3' keyword bait
'утеряны все данные, нужно разлочить' — iCloud-LOCKED, unusable/possibly stolen
M1 Air + M2 PRO combo listing, not an Air M2
MDM-locked (honest title) — corporate management profile, real usage constraint

trap_notes: 1) Gemini single-call 'top 10' fabricated ALL listing URLs (sequential -ID1..-ID10, every one 404). 2) An OLX listing can be repurposed: slug 'macbook-air-m2', live content = Dyson straightener (HTTP 200, status active). 3) OLX search itself is phrase-adjacency-sensitive — a single query misses valid items; ANY sweep (model or code) must union multiple query variants. 4) Cheapest-looking items carry the disqualifiers: parts, M1 bait, admitted defects, iCloud/MDM locks.
